title: stelis agatha
intro: Stelis agatha is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, specifically found in the tropical regions of Costa Rica and Panama. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis agatha include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Stelis agatha typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which are used to create teas, tinctures, and topical applications for medicinal purposes.
